title: Alternative Energy

vocabulary.meaning: related to energy from the sun
an area with many large wind machines producing electricity
a substance used to produce energy
able to be replaced naturally and used again

questions: Do you try to save energy in your home? In what ways?
Would you be willing to pay more for electricity if it came from renewable energy sources?
Do you know how the energy you use in your home is produced?
Do you think there will be a major war over finite fossil fuels in the next 100 years?
How dependent is your country on non-renewable energy sources?
Has your country taken any steps to reduce its dependence on non-renewable energy sources?
Which source of renewable energy do you think will be used most in your country in the future?
Would you invest in 'green' investments? Why/why not?
Would you consider powering your home using solar panels? What are the pros and cons of doing so?
Which form of alternative energy 'ticks the most boxes', in your opinion? Which will be used most in the future?
Do you think all countries will ever sign the Kyoto protocol? Why/why not?
Do you think governments do enough to address environmental issues?
Do you think alternative energies should be subsidised by governments? What are the pros and cons of doing this?
